qa_pairs.question: How do you invite users to a Globus group?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can be invited to a Globus group by entering an email address (preferred) or searching for their username. After selecting the users, click the "Add" button, and an email invitation will be sent to them. They will become visible in the group once they accept the invitation.

qa_pairs.question: What roles can be assigned to a user in a Globus group, and how are membership changes saved?
qa_pairs.answer: Within a Globus group, you can assign users one of three roles: Admin (full access), Manager (can change user roles), or Member (no management functions). To modify a user's role or status, click on the user and then click the "Save Changes" button to commit the updates.
